text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right, then! Next up is some paced<n>running, my
darling ponies!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll think up some individual training<n>exercises for
each of you in the<n>meantime.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So please... don't take too long. I'd<n>prefer it if
you'd return to my side in a<n>timely matter. Have I
made myself<n>clear?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
U-um! By "individual training<n>exercises," do you
mean you'll train<n>us one-on-one?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but of course! You have that to<n>look
forward to when you get back.<n>Now off you all
go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: You did a great job getting them motivated.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Receiving such high praise<n>from an actual
trainer is a tad<n>embarrassing, I must say.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Still, as their senior and dorm leader,<n>it's my duty
to instruct them properly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In your professional opinion as a<n>trainer, what do
you think I should<n>teach them next?
choice_data_list: The trick to rounding the last corner.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The final corner can certainly be the<n>
make-or-break point in a race. What<n>can I do to
help them gain more<n>experience for that? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know! I can play tag with them! I'll<n>run as fast
as I can, and they'll have<n>to try to catch me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That way, they'll be able to learn how<n>to sprint
all-out when it counts, while<n>also having fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. Each<n>Umamusume has her
own running<n>style, and it's about time I started<n>
teaching them methods that best suit<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Which means the time has come to<n>conduct my
special heart-racing,<n>all-knowing personality test
for<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Once I've got a handle on who they<n>are, I can
teach them the running<n>method that match them
perfectly!
